[Fact]
public async Task NotifyRetryExhaustedAsync_WhenCalled_ShouldCompleteSuccessfully()
{
    // Arrange
    var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DiaExceptionNotificationService>>();

    var service = new DiaExceptionNotificationService(
        loggerMock.Object);

    var exception = new InvalidOperationException("Retry exhausted");

    // Act
    await service.NotifyRetryExhaustedAsync(
        "test-file.txt",
        "D365DataverseSaveFailure",
        exception);

    // Assert
    loggerMock.Verify(
        logger => logger.Log(
            LogLevel.Error,
            It.IsAny<EventId>(),
            It.Is<It.IsAnyType>((value, type) =>
                value.ToString()!.Contains("DIA exception notification required")),
            exception,
            It.IsAny<Func<It.IsAnyType, Exception?, string>>()),
        Times.Once);
}
